'''由加神社'''、'''瑜伽神社'''（ゆがじんじゃ）
*[[由加神社本宮]] - 岡山県[[倉敷市]][[児島]]の[[由加山]]に鎮座。以下の本宮。 **[[由加神社 (大阪市中央区)]] - [[大阪府]][[大阪市]][[中央区 (大阪市)|中央区]]に鎮座。 **[[由加神社 (大阪市西成区)]] - 大阪府大阪市[[西成区]]に鎮座。 **[[由賀大神]] - 大阪府大阪市[[阿倍野区]]に鎮座。 **[[由加神社 (太子町)]] - [[兵庫県]][[揖保郡]][[太子町 (兵庫県)|太子町]]に鎮座。 **[[由加稲荷神社]] - 兵庫県[[姫路市]]に鎮座。 **[[由加神社 (奈良市)]] - [[奈良県]][[奈良市]]に鎮座。 **[[由加神社 (岡山市中区)]] - 岡山県[[岡山市]][[中区 (岡山市)|中区]]に鎮座。 **[[由加神社 (岡山市北区)]] - 岡山県岡山市[[北区 (岡山市)|北区]]に鎮座。 **[[由加神社 (倉敷市水島)]] - 岡山県倉敷市[[水島]]に鎮座。 **[[由加神社 (和気町)]] - 岡山県[[和気郡]][[和気町]]に鎮座。 **[[瑜伽神社 (徳島市)]] - [[徳島県]][[徳島市]]に鎮座。 **[[瑜伽大菩薩]] - 徳島県徳島市に鎮座。 **[[瑜伽神社 (小松島市)]] - 徳島県[[小松島市]]に鎮座。 **[[伊宇賀神社]] - 徳島県[[鳴門市]]に鎮座。 **[[瑜伽神社 (吉野川市)]] - 徳島県[[吉野川市]]に鎮座。 **[[由加神社 (坂出市)]] - [[香川県]][[坂出市]]に鎮座。市内に同名神社が2社ある。 **[[瑜伽神社 (国東市)]] - [[大分県]][[国東市]]に鎮座。 **瑜伽神社 (国東市国見町) - 大分県国東市[[国見町]]に鎮座。[[岩倉八幡宮]]の境内社。 **瑜伽神社 (臼杵市) - 大分県[[臼杵市]]に鎮座。[[福良天満宮]]の境内社。
==関連項目== *[[瑜伽大権現]] *[[瑜伽大権現 (曖昧さ回避)]] - 曖昧さ回避ページ *[[由加山]] *[[蓮台寺 (倉敷市)|蓮台寺]]
{{aimai}} {{デフォルトソート:ゆかしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

'''由加神社'''、'''瑜伽神社'''（ゆがじんじゃ）
*[[由加神社本宮]] - 岡山県[[倉敷市]][[児島]]の[[由加山]]に鎮座。以下の本宮。 **[[由加神社 (大阪市中央区)]] - [[大阪府]][[大阪市]][[中央区 (大阪市)|中央区]]に鎮座。 **[[由加神社 (大阪市西成区)]] - 大阪府大阪市[[西成区]]に鎮座。 **[[由賀大神]] - 大阪府大阪市[[阿倍野区]]に鎮座。 **[[由加神社 (太子町)]] - [[兵庫県]][[揖保郡]][[太子町 (兵庫県)|太子町]]に鎮座。 **[[由加稲荷神社]] - 兵庫県[[姫路市]]に鎮座。 **[[由加神社 (奈良市)]] - [[奈良県]][[奈良市]]に鎮座。 **[[由加神社 (岡山市中区)]] - 岡山県[[岡山市]][[中区 (岡山市)|中区]]に鎮座。 **[[由加神社 (岡山市北区)]] - 岡山県岡山市[[北区 (岡山市)|北区]]に鎮座。 **[[由加神社 (倉敷市)]] - 岡山県[[倉敷市]][[水島]]に鎮座。 **[[由加神社 (和気町)]] - 岡山県[[和気郡]][[和気町]]に鎮座。 **[[瑜伽神社 (徳島市)]] - [[徳島県]][[徳島市]]に鎮座。 **[[瑜伽大菩薩]] - 徳島県徳島市に鎮座。 **[[瑜伽神社 (小松島市)]] - 徳島県[[小松島市]]に鎮座。 **[[伊宇賀神社]] - 徳島県[[鳴門市]]に鎮座。 **[[瑜伽神社 (吉野川市)]] - 徳島県[[吉野川市]]に鎮座。 **[[由加神社 (坂出市)]] - [[香川県]][[坂出市]]に鎮座。市内に同名神社が2社ある。 **[[瑜伽神社 (国東市)]] - [[大分県]][[国東市]]に鎮座。 **瑜伽神社 (国東市国見町櫛来) - 大分県国東市国見町櫛来に鎮座。[[岩倉八幡社]]の境内社。 **瑜伽神社 (臼杵市) - 大分県[[臼杵市]]に鎮座。[[福良天満宮]]の境内社。
==関連項目== *[[瑜伽大権現]] *[[瑜伽大権現 (曖昧さ回避)]] - 曖昧さ回避ページ *[[由加山]] *[[蓮台寺 (倉敷市)|蓮台寺]]

'''由加神社'''、'''瑜伽神社'''（ゆがじんじゃ、ゆうがじんじゃ）

'''由加神社'''、'''瑜伽神社'''（ゆがじんじゃ、ゆうがじんじゃ）
* [[由加神社本宮]] - 岡山県[[倉敷市]][[児島地域 (倉敷市)|児島]]の[[由加山]]に鎮座。 * 由加神社本宮の末宮。日本全国に52社ある<ref>[http://www.yugasan.or.jp/massya-meguri/meguri01.html 由加神社巡り] 由加神社本宮</ref>。 ** [[由加神社 (大阪市中央区)]] - [[大阪府]][[大阪市]][[中央区 (大阪市)|中央区]]に鎮座。 ** [[由加神社 (大阪市西成区)]] - 大阪府大阪市[[西成区]]に鎮座。 ** [[由賀大神]] - 大阪府大阪市[[阿倍野区]]に鎮座。 ** [[由加神社 (太子町)]] - [[兵庫県]][[揖保郡]][[太子町 (兵庫県)|太子町]]に鎮座。 ** [[由加稲荷神社]] - 兵庫県[[姫路市]]に鎮座。 ** [[瑜伽神社 (奈良市)]] - [[奈良県]][[奈良市]][[高畑町]]1059、瑜伽山中腹に鎮座。 ** [[由加神社 (岡山市中区)]] - 岡山県[[岡山市]][[中区 (岡山市)|中区]]に鎮座。 ** [[由加神社 (岡山市北区)]] - 岡山県岡山市[[北区 (岡山市)|北区]]に鎮座。 ** [[由加神社 (倉敷市)]] - 岡山県[[倉敷市]][[水島地域|水島]]に鎮座。 ** [[由加神社 (和気町)]] - 岡山県[[和気郡]][[和気町]]に鎮座。 ** [[瑜伽神社 (徳島市)]] - [[徳島県]][[徳島市]]に鎮座。 ** [[瑜伽大菩薩]] - 徳島県徳島市に鎮座。 ** [[瑜伽神社 (小松島市)]] - 徳島県[[小松島市]]に鎮座。 ** [[伊宇賀神社]] - 徳島県[[鳴門市]]に鎮座。 ** [[瑜伽神社 (吉野川市)]] - 徳島県[[吉野川市]]に鎮座。 ** [[由加神社 (坂出市)]] - [[香川県]][[坂出市]]に鎮座。市内に同名神社が2社ある。 ** 愈加神社 - [[大分県]][[宇佐市]]に鎮座。[[宇佐神宮]]の境内社。 ** 瑜伽宮 - 大分県[[国東市]]国見町櫛来に鎮座。[[ケベス祭#岩倉社|岩倉社]]の境内社。 ** 瑜伽神社 - 大分県[[臼杵市]]に鎮座。[[福良天満宮]]の境内社。
== 脚注 == {{reflist}}
== 関連項目 == * [[瑜伽大権現]] * [[瑜伽大権現 (曖昧さ回避)]] - 曖昧さ回避ページ * [[由加山]] * [[蓮台寺 (倉敷市)]]
{{aimai}} {{デフォルトソート:ゆかしんしや}} [[Category:Shrines with identical names]] [[ja:由加神社]][[category:kk]] [[Category:瑜伽信仰]]

revision.text:
'''Yuga Shrine''' or '''Yuga Shrine''' (由加神社 / 瑜伽神社, Yuga Jinja, Yūga Jinja)
* {{ill|Yuga Shrine Honmiya|ja|由加神社本宮}} - Located on Mount Yuga in [[Kojima, Kurashiki|Kojima]], [[Kurashiki City]], Okayama Prefecture. * Branch shrines of Yuga Shrine Honmiya. There are 52 branch shrines across Japan<ref>[http://www.yugasan.or.jp/massya-meguri/meguri01.html Yuga Shrine Pilgrimage] Yuga Shrine Honmiya</ref>. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Chūō-ku, Osaka)|ja|由加神社 (大阪市中央区)}} - Located in [[Chūō-ku, Osaka]], Osaka Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Nishinari-ku, Osaka)|ja|由加神社 (大阪市西成区)}} - Located in [[Nishinari-ku, Osaka]], Osaka Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Daijin|ja|由賀大神}} - Located in [[Abeno-ku, Osaka]], Osaka Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Taishi Town)|ja|由加神社 (太子町)}} - Located in [[Taishi, Hyōgo|Taishi Town]], [[Ibo District, Hyōgo|Ibo District]], Hyōgo Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Inari Shrine|ja|由加稲荷神社}} - Located in [[Himeji]], Hyōgo Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Nara City)|ja|瑜伽神社 (奈良市)}} - Located in [[Takahata-chō, Nara]], on the slopes of Mount Yuga, Nara Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Naka-ku, Okayama)|ja|由加神社 (岡山市中区)}} - Located in [[Naka-ku, Okayama]], Okayama Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Kita-ku, Okayama)|ja|由加神社 (岡山市北区)}} - Located in [[Kita-ku, Okayama]], Okayama Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Kurashiki)|ja|由加神社 (倉敷市)}} - Located in [[Mizushima, Kurashiki]], Okayama Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Wake Town)|ja|由加神社 (和気町)}} - Located in [[Wake, Okayama|Wake Town]], [[Wake District]], Okayama Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Tokushima City)|ja|瑜伽神社 (徳島市)}} - Located in [[Tokushima City]], Tokushima Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Daibosatsu|ja|瑜伽大菩薩}} - Located in Tokushima City, Tokushima Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Komatsushima City)|ja|瑜伽神社 (小松島市)}} - Located in [[Komatsushima]], Tokushima Prefecture. ** {{ill|Iuga Shrine|ja|伊宇賀神社}} - Located in [[Naruto, Tokushima|Naruto City]], Tokushima Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Yoshinogawa City)|ja|瑜伽神社 (吉野川市)}} - Located in [[Yoshinogawa]], Tokushima Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Sakaide)|ja|由加神社 (坂出市)}} - Located in [[Sakaide]], Kagawa Prefecture. There are two shrines with the same name in the city. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Usa City)|ja|愈加神社}} - Located in [[Usa, Ōita|Usa City]], Ōita Prefecture, as a subordinate shrine of [[Usa Jingū]]. ** {{ill|Yuga Palace|ja|瑜伽宮}} - Located in [[Kunisaki, Ōita|Kunisaki City]], Oita Prefecture, as a subordinate shrine of the {{ill|Iwakura Shrine|ja|岩倉社}}. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Usuki City)|ja|瑜伽神社 (臼杵市)}} - Located in [[Usuki, Ōita|Usuki City]], Ōita Prefecture, as a subordinate shrine of {{ill|Fukura Tenmangū|ja|福良天満宮}}.
== References == {{reflist}}
== See Also == * {{ill|Yuga Daigongen|ja|瑜伽大権現}} * {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (disambiguation)|ja|瑜伽大権現 (曖昧さ回避)}} - Disambiguation page. * {{ill|Yuga Mountain|ja|由加山}} * {{ill|Rendaiji (Kurashiki)|ja|蓮台寺 (倉敷市)}}

revision.text:
'''Yuga Shrine''' or '''Yuga Shrine''' (由加神社 / 瑜伽神社, Yuga Jinja, Yūga Jinja)
* {{ill|Yuga Shrine Honmiya|ja|由加神社本宮}} - Located on Mount Yuga in [[Kojima, Kurashiki|Kojima]], [[Kurashiki City]], Okayama Prefecture. * Branch shrines of Yuga Shrine Honmiya. There are 52 branch shrines across Japan<ref>[http://www.yugasan.or.jp/massya-meguri/meguri01.html Yuga Shrine Pilgrimage] Yuga Shrine Honmiya</ref>. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Chūō-ku, Osaka)|ja|由加神社 (大阪市中央区)}} - Located in [[Chūō-ku, Osaka]], Osaka Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Nishinari-ku, Osaka)|ja|由加神社 (大阪市西成区)}} - Located in [[Nishinari-ku, Osaka]], Osaka Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Daijin|ja|由賀大神}} - Located in [[Abeno-ku, Osaka]], Osaka Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Taishi Town)|ja|由加神社 (太子町)}} - Located in [[Taishi, Hyōgo|Taishi Town]], [[Ibo District, Hyōgo|Ibo District]], Hyōgo Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Inari Shrine|ja|由加稲荷神社}} - Located in [[Himeji]], Hyōgo Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Nara City)|ja|瑜伽神社 (奈良市)}} - Located in [[Takahata-chō, Nara]], on the slopes of Mount Yuga, Nara Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Naka-ku, Okayama)|ja|由加神社 (岡山市中区)}} - Located in [[Naka-ku, Okayama]], Okayama Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Kita-ku, Okayama)|ja|由加神社 (岡山市北区)}} - Located in [[Kita-ku, Okayama]], Okayama Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Kurashiki)|ja|由加神社 (倉敷市)}} - Located in [[Mizushima, Kurashiki]], Okayama Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Wake Town)|ja|由加神社 (和気町)}} - Located in [[Wake, Okayama|Wake Town]], [[Wake District]], Okayama Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Tokushima City)|ja|瑜伽神社 (徳島市)}} - Located in [[Tokushima City]], Tokushima Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Daibosatsu|ja|瑜伽大菩薩}} - Located in Tokushima City, Tokushima Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Komatsushima City)|ja|瑜伽神社 (小松島市)}} - Located in [[Komatsushima]], Tokushima Prefecture. ** {{ill|Iuga Shrine|ja|伊宇賀神社}} - Located in [[Naruto, Tokushima|Naruto City]], Tokushima Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Yoshinogawa City)|ja|瑜伽神社 (吉野川市)}} - Located in [[Yoshinogawa]], Tokushima Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Sakaide)|ja|由加神社 (坂出市)}} - Located in [[Sakaide]], Kagawa Prefecture. There are two shrines with the same name in the city. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Usa City)|ja|愈加神社}} - Located in [[Usa, Ōita|Usa City]], Ōita Prefecture, as a subordinate shrine of [[Usa Jingū]]. ** {{ill|Yuga Palace|ja|瑜伽宮}} - Located in [[Kunisaki, Ōita|Kunisaki City]], Oita Prefecture, as a subordinate shrine of the {{ill|Iwakura Shrine|ja|岩倉社}}. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Usuki City)|ja|瑜伽神社 (臼杵市)}} - Located in [[Usuki, Ōita|Usuki City]], Ōita Prefecture, as a subordinate shrine of {{ill|Fukura Tenmangū|ja|福良天満宮}}.

There are 52 branch shrines across Japan<ref>[http://www.yugasan.or.jp/massya-meguri/meguri01.html Yuga Shrine Pilgrimage] Yuga Shrine Honmiya</ref>. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Chūō-ku, Osaka)|ja|由加神社 (大阪市中央区)}} - Located in [[Chūō-ku, Osaka]], Osaka Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Nishinari-ku, Osaka)|ja|由加神社 (大阪市西成区)}} - Located in [[Nishinari-ku, Osaka]], Osaka Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Daijin|ja|由賀大神}} - Located in [[Abeno-ku, Osaka]], Osaka Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Taishi Town)|ja|由加神社 (太子町)}} - Located in [[Taishi, Hyōgo|Taishi Town]], [[Ibo District, Hyōgo|Ibo District]], Hyōgo Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Inari Shrine|ja|由加稲荷神社}} - Located in [[Himeji]], Hyōgo Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Nara City)|ja|瑜伽神社 (奈良市)}} - Located in [[Takahata-chō, Nara]], on the slopes of Mount Yuga, Nara Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Naka-ku, Okayama)|ja|由加神社 (岡山市中区)}} - Located in [[Naka-ku, Okayama]], Okayama Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Kita-ku, Okayama)|ja|由加神社 (岡山市北区)}} - Located in [[Kita-ku, Okayama]], Okayama Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Kurashiki)|ja|由加神社 (倉敷市)}} - Located in [[Mizushima, Kurashiki]], Okayama Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Wake Town)|ja|由加神社 (和気町)}} - Located in [[Wake, Okayama|Wake Town]], [[Wake District]], Okayama Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Tokushima City)|ja|瑜伽神社 (徳島市)}} - Located in [[Tokushima City]], Tokushima Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Daibosatsu|ja|瑜伽大菩薩}} - Located in Tokushima City, Tokushima Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Komatsushima City)|ja|瑜伽神社 (小松島市)}} - Located in [[Komatsushima]], Tokushima Prefecture. ** {{ill|Iuga Shrine|ja|伊宇賀神社}} - Located in [[Naruto, Tokushima|Naruto City]], Tokushima Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Yoshinogawa City)|ja|瑜伽神社 (吉野川市)}} - Located in [[Yoshinogawa]], Tokushima Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Sakaide)|ja|由加神社 (坂出市)}} - Located in [[Sakaide]], Kagawa Prefecture. revision.text:
'''Yuga Shrine''' or '''Yuga Shrine''' (由加神社 / 瑜伽神社, Yuga Jinja, Yūga Jinja)
* {{ill|Yuga Shrine Honmiya|ja|由加神社本宮}} - Located on Mount Yuga in [[Kojima, Kurashiki|Kojima]], [[Kurashiki City]], Okayama Prefecture. * Branch shrines of Yuga Shrine Honmiya. There are 52 branch shrines across Japan<ref>[http://www.yugasan.or.jp/massya-meguri/meguri01.html Yuga Shrine Pilgrimage] Yuga Shrine Honmiya</ref>. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Chūō-ku, Osaka)|ja|由加神社 (大阪市中央区)}} - Located in [[Chūō-ku, Osaka]], Osaka Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Nishinari-ku, Osaka)|ja|由加神社 (大阪市西成区)}} - Located in [[Nishinari-ku, Osaka]], Osaka Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Daijin|ja|由賀大神}} - Located in [[Abeno-ku, Osaka]], Osaka Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Taishi Town)|ja|由加神社 (太子町)}} - Located in [[Taishi, Hyōgo|Taishi Town]], [[Ibo District, Hyōgo|Ibo District]], Hyōgo Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Inari Shrine|ja|由加稲荷神社}} - Located in [[Himeji]], Hyōgo Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Nara City)|ja|瑜伽神社 (奈良市)}} - Located in [[Takahata-chō, Nara]], on the slopes of Mount Yuga, Nara Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Naka-ku, Okayama)|ja|由加神社 (岡山市中区)}} - Located in [[Naka-ku, Okayama]], Okayama Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Kita-ku, Okayama)|ja|由加神社 (岡山市北区)}} - Located in [[Kita-ku, Okayama]], Okayama Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Kurashiki)|ja|由加神社 (倉敷市)}} - Located in [[Mizushima, Kurashiki]], Okayama Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Wake Town)|ja|由加神社 (和気町)}} - Located in [[Wake, Okayama|Wake Town]], [[Wake District]], Okayama Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Tokushima City)|ja|瑜伽神社 (徳島市)}} - Located in [[Tokushima City]], Tokushima Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Daibosatsu|ja|瑜伽大菩薩}} - Located in Tokushima City, Tokushima Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Komatsushima City)|ja|瑜伽神社 (小松島市)}} - Located in [[Komatsushima]], Tokushima Prefecture. ** {{ill|Iuga Shrine|ja|伊宇賀神社}} - Located in [[Naruto, Tokushima|Naruto City]], Tokushima Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Yoshinogawa City)|ja|瑜伽神社 (吉野川市)}} - Located in [[Yoshinogawa]], Tokushima Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Sakaide)|ja|由加神社 (坂出市)}} - Located in [[Sakaide]], Kagawa Prefecture. There are two shrines with the same name in the city. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Usa City)|ja|愈加神社}} - Located in [[Usa, Ōita|Usa City]], Ōita Prefecture, as a subordinate shrine of [[Usa Jingū]]. ** {{ill|Yuga Palace|ja|瑜伽宮}} - Located in [[Kunisaki, Ōita|Kunisaki City]], Oita Prefecture, as a subordinate shrine of the {{ill|Iwakura Shrine|ja|岩倉社}}. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Usuki City)|ja|瑜伽神社 (臼杵市)}} - Located in [[Usuki, Ōita|Usuki City]], Ōita Prefecture, as a subordinate shrine of {{ill|Fukura Tenmangū|ja|福良天満宮}}.
== References == {{reflist}} == See Also == * {{ill|Yuga Daigongen|ja|瑜伽大権現}} * {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (disambiguation)|ja|瑜伽大権現 (曖昧さ回避)}} - Disambiguation page. * {{ill|Yuga Mountain|ja|由加山}} * {{ill|Rendaiji (Kurashiki)|ja|蓮台寺 (倉敷市)}}

revision.text:
'''由加神社'''、'''瑜伽神社'''（ゆがじんじゃ、ゆうがじんじゃ）
* [[由加神社本宮]] - 岡山県[[倉敷市]][[児島地域 (倉敷市)|児島]]の[[由加山]]に鎮座。 * 由加神社本宮の末宮。日本全国に52社ある<ref>[http://www.yugasan.or.jp/massya-meguri/meguri01.html 由加神社巡り] 由加神社本宮</ref>。 ** [[由加神社 (大阪市中央区)]] - [[大阪府]][[大阪市]][[中央区 (大阪市)|中央区]]に鎮座。 ** [[由加神社 (大阪市西成区)]] - 大阪府大阪市[[西成区]]に鎮座。 ** [[由賀大神]] - 大阪府大阪市[[阿倍野区]]に鎮座。 ** [[由加神社 (太子町)]] - [[兵庫県]][[揖保郡]][[太子町 (兵庫県)|太子町]]に鎮座。 ** [[由加稲荷神社]] - 兵庫県[[姫路市]]に鎮座。 ** [[瑜伽神社 (奈良市)]] - [[奈良県]][[奈良市]][[高畑町]]1059、瑜伽山中腹に鎮座。 ** [[由加神社 (岡山市中区)]] - 岡山県[[岡山市]][[中区 (岡山市)|中区]]に鎮座。 ** [[由加神社 (岡山市北区)]] - 岡山県岡山市[[北区 (岡山市)|北区]]に鎮座。 ** [[由加神社 (倉敷市)]] - 岡山県[[倉敷市]][[水島地域|水島]]に鎮座。 ** [[由加神社 (和気町)]] - 岡山県[[和気郡]][[和気町]]に鎮座。 ** [[瑜伽神社 (徳島市)]] - [[徳島県]][[徳島市]]に鎮座。 ** [[瑜伽大菩薩]] - 徳島県徳島市に鎮座。 ** [[瑜伽神社 (小松島市)]] - 徳島県[[小松島市]]に鎮座。 ** [[伊宇賀神社]] - 徳島県[[鳴門市]]に鎮座。 ** [[瑜伽神社 (吉野川市)]] - 徳島県[[吉野川市]]に鎮座。 ** [[由加神社 (坂出市)]] - [[香川県]][[坂出市]]に鎮座。市内に同名神社が2社ある。 ** 愈加神社 - [[大分県]][[宇佐市]]に鎮座。[[宇佐神宮]]の境内社。 ** 瑜伽宮 - 大分県[[国東市]]国見町櫛来に鎮座。[[ケベス祭#岩倉社|岩倉社]]の境内社。 ** 瑜伽神社 - 大分県[[臼杵市]]に鎮座。[[福良天満宮]]の境内社。
== 脚注 == {{reflist}}
== 関連項目 == * [[瑜伽大権現]] * [[瑜伽大権現 (曖昧さ回避)]] - 曖昧さ回避ページ * [[由加山]] * [[蓮台寺 (倉敷市)]]
{{aimai}} {{デフォルトソート:ゆかしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]] [[Category:瑜伽信仰]]

revision.text:
'''由加神社'''、'''瑜伽神社'''（ゆがじんじゃ、ゆうがじんじゃ）

== 脚注 == {{reflist}}
== 関連項目 == * [[瑜伽大権現]] * [[瑜伽大権現 (曖昧さ回避)]] - 曖昧さ回避ページ * [[由加山]] * [[蓮台寺 (倉敷市)]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:由加神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11577572]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:34, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yuga Shrine''' or '''Yuga Shrine''' (由加神社 / 瑜伽神社, Yuga Jinja, Yūga Jinja)
* {{ill|Yuga Shrine|lt=Yuga Shrine|lt=Yuga Shrine Honmiya|ja|由加神社本宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuga Shrine Honmiya|qq=}} - Located on Mount Yuga in [[Kojima, Kurashiki|Kojima]], [[Kurashiki City]], Okayama Prefecture. * Branch shrines of Yuga Shrine Honmiya. There are 52 branch shrines across Japan<ref>[http://www.yugasan.or.jp/massya-meguri/meguri01.html Yuga Shrine Pilgrimage] Yuga Shrine Honmiya</ref>. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Chūō-ku, Osaka)|ja|由加神社 (大阪市中央区)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuga Shrine (Chūō-ku, Osaka)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Chūō-ku, Osaka|Chūō-ku, Osaka]], Osaka Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Nishinari-ku, Osaka)|ja|由加神社 (大阪市西成区)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuga Shrine (Nishinari-ku, Osaka)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Nishinari-ku, Osaka|Nishinari-ku, Osaka]], Osaka Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Daijin|ja|由賀大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuga Daijin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Abeno-ku, Osaka|Abeno-ku, Osaka]], Osaka Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Taishi Town)|ja|由加神社 (太子町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuga Shrine (Taishi Town)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Taishi, Hyōgo|Taishi Town]], [[:en:Ibo District, Hyōgo|Ibo District]], Hyōgo Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Inari Shrine|ja|由加稲荷神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuga Inari Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Himeji|Himeji]], Hyōgo Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Nara)|lt=Yuga Shrine (Nara)|lt=Yuga Shrine (Nara City)|ja|瑜伽神社 (奈良市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuga Shrine (Nara City)|qq=}} - Located in [[Takahata-chō, Nara]], on the slopes of Mount Yuga, Nara Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Naka-ku, Okayama)|ja|由加神社 (岡山市中区)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuga Shrine (Naka-ku, Okayama)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Naka-ku, Okayama|Naka-ku, Okayama]], Okayama Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Kita-ku, Okayama)|ja|由加神社 (岡山市北区)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuga Shrine (Kita-ku, Okayama)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Kita-ku, Okayama|Kita-ku, Okayama]], Okayama Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Kurashiki)|ja|由加神社 (倉敷市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuga Shrine (Kurashiki)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[Mizushima, Kurashiki]], Okayama Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Wake Town)|ja|由加神社 (和気町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuga Shrine (Wake Town)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Wake, Okayama|Wake Town]], [[Wake District]], Okayama Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Tokushima City)|ja|瑜伽神社 (徳島市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuga Shrine (Tokushima City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Tokushima City|Tokushima City]], Tokushima Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Daibosatsu|ja|瑜伽大菩薩|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuga Daibosatsu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Tokushima City, Tokushima Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Komatsushima City)|ja|瑜伽神社 (小松島市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuga Shrine (Komatsushima City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Komatsushima|Komatsushima]], Tokushima Prefecture. ** {{ill|Iuga Shrine|ja|伊宇賀神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iuga Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Naruto, Tokushima|Naruto City]], Tokushima Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Yoshinogawa City)|ja|瑜伽神社 (吉野川市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuga Shrine (Yoshinogawa City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Yoshinogawa|Yoshinogawa]], Tokushima Prefecture. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Sakaide)|ja|由加神社 (坂出市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuga Shrine (Sakaide)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Sakaide|Sakaide]], Kagawa Prefecture. There are two shrines with the same name in the city. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Usa City)|ja|愈加神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuga Shrine (Usa City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Usa, Ōita|Usa City]], Ōita Prefecture, as a subordinate shrine of [[Usa Jingū]]. ** {{ill|Yuga Palace|ja|瑜伽宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuga Palace|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Kunisaki, Ōita|Kunisaki City]], Oita Prefecture, as a subordinate shrine of the {{ill|Iwakura Shrine|ja|岩倉社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwakura Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Usuki City)|ja|瑜伽神社 (臼杵市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuga Shrine (Usuki City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Usuki, Ōita|Usuki City]], Ōita Prefecture, as a subordinate shrine of {{ill|Fukura Tenmangū|ja|福良天満宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukura Tenmangū|qq=}}.
== References == {{reflist}} == See Also == * {{ill|Yuga Daigongen|ja|瑜伽大権現|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuga Daigongen|qq=}} * {{ill|Yuga Daigongen (disambiguation)|ja|瑜伽大権現 (曖昧さ回避)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuga Daigongen (disambiguation)|qq=}} - Disambiguation page. * {{ill|Yuga Mountain|ja|由加山|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuga Mountain|qq=}} * {{ill|Yugasan Rendaiji|ja|蓮台寺 (倉敷市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yugasan Rendaiji|qq=}}

There are 52 branch shrines across Japan<ref>[http://www.yugasan.or.jp/massya-meguri/meguri01.html Yuga Shrine Pilgrimage] Yuga Shrine Honmiya</ref>. ** {{ill|Yuga Shrine (Chūō-ku, Osaka)|ja|由加神社 (大阪市中央区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuga Shrine (Chūō-ku, Osaka)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} -
